items.title: Statement on the US government directive to suspend access to Fable 5 and Mythos 5
items.original_summary: The US government has issued an export control directive to suspend all access to Fable 5 and Mythos 5.
items.chinese_summary: 跟进报道（与历史 Statement on Fable 5/Mythos 5 一致）：Anthropic 发布官方声明，响应美国政府出口管制指令，立即暂停 Claude Fable 5 与 Claude Mythos 5 的全部访问权限。这是合规层面的强制中断，所有相关 API 调用都不可用。开发团队必须停用相关 model id 并切换备选模型。
items.backend_focus: 立即行动：在代码/配置中移除 claude-fable-5、claude-mythos-5 等相关 model 名称，统一回退到 claude-opus-4-8 或其他可用版本；检查是否有定时任务或 batch 调用仍指向被禁模型并立即下线。

items.title: Introducing Claude Tag Claude Tag is a new way for teams to work with Claude.
items.original_summary: Policy  Policy on the AI Exponential AI is advancing at exponential speed, and the policymaking process was built for a slower world. We’re sharing policy proposals to prepare our institutions for AI progress. Announcements  Introducing Claude Corps We’re launching Claude Corps, a national fellowship program for people early in their careers who are passionate about extending the benefits of AI to communities across America. Announcements  Expanding Project Glasswing We’re extending Project Glas...
items.chinese_summary: Anthropic 推出 Claude Tag，一种团队与 Claude 协作的新方式。属于协作/组织管理层面产品（标签化工作流），不涉及 Messages API、Beta headers、Tool Use 等接口契约变化。本次更新对纯 API 集成方影响有限。
items.backend_focus: 关注官方文档更新：Claude Tag 当前定位偏向团队协作 UI 层，开发者侧 API 无字段变化；若团队使用 console 工作流，可在新版界面 review 是否支持 tag 检索历史会话。

items.chinese_summary: Anthropic 启动 Claude Corps 全国奖学金项目，面向早期职业者推广 AI 社区受益。这是人才/品牌项目，并非模型或 API 更新。对 SDK、API、模型版本或定价无任何影响。
items.backend_focus: 无。与工程无关，属于人才培养与品牌项目，开发者无需任何代码或配置变更。

items.title: Expanding Project Glasswing We’re extending Project Glasswing to approximately 150 new organizations in more than fifteen countries.
items.original_summary: Introducing Claude Tag Claude Tag is a new way for teams to work with Claude. Policy  Policy on the AI Exponential AI is advancing at exponential speed, and the policymaking process was built for a slower world. We’re sharing policy proposals to prepare our institutions for AI progress. Announcements  Introducing Claude Corps We’re launching Claude Corps, a national fellowship program for people early in their careers who are passionate about extending the benefits of AI to communities across Am...
items.chinese_summary: Anthropic 扩展 Project Glasswing 至约 150 个新组织、覆盖 15+ 国家，是安全/政策研究合作项目扩容。这是合作计划扩容，不涉及 API、SDK 或模型能力的新发布。
items.backend_focus: 无。与工程无关，属安全研究合作扩容，开发者侧 API 行为无任何变化，无需调整。

items.title: Introducing Claude Opus 4.8 An upgrade to our Opus class of models, with stronger performance across coding, agentic tasks, and professional work, and the consi
items.original_summary: Introducing Claude Tag Claude Tag is a new way for teams to work with Claude. Policy  Policy on the AI Exponential AI is advancing at exponential speed, and the policymaking process was built for a slower world. We’re sharing policy proposals to prepare our institutions for AI progress. Announcements  Introducing Claude Corps We’re launching Claude Corps, a national fellowship program for people early in their careers who are passionate about extending the benefits of AI to communities across Am...
items.chinese_summary: Anthropic 正式发布 Claude Opus 4.8，相对此前 Opus 系列在编码、Agent 任务与专业工作流上更强，并延续既有 Tool Use/MCP 兼容接口。模型名称从 claude-opus-4-5 等切换到 4.8 后可在部分基准上获得提升，老 Opus 4.x 系列将进入 deprecation 时间线。
items.backend_focus: 升级方式：API 请求中 model 字段改为 claude-opus-4-8，确认 max_tokens、context window、Tool Use schema 是否与 4.5 兼容；同时在 fallback 列表中保留旧 Opus id 一段时间，待官方公布 deprecation 日期后再移除。

items.title: Anthropic opens Seoul office and announces new partnerships across the Korean AI ecosystem
items.chinese_summary: Anthropic 开设首尔办公室并宣布韩国 AI 生态新合作，是区域市场拓展公告。这是 BD/品牌动作，无任何 API、SDK、模型或定价变更。对开发者集成无即时影响。
items.backend_focus: 无。与工程无关，属区域市场公告。韩国用户原本已可通过 anthropic.com 调用 Claude API，无需在客户端做 region 路由变更。

items.title: Results from the first Anthropic Public Record
items.chinese_summary: Anthropic 公布首个 Anthropic Public Record 的结果，公开部分模型行为与决策记录。这是透明度报告性质的内容，不涉及 API、SDK、模型版本或限流变化。
items.backend_focus: 无。与工程无关，属透明度与合规披露内容，开发者侧 API 行为无变化，无需调整代码或配置。

items.title: TCS and Anthropic partner to bring Claude to regulated industries
items.chinese_summary: Anthropic 与 TCS 达成合作，将 Claude 引入受监管行业。这是企业合作公告，不涉及 API 新参数、模型新版本或 SDK 变更。
items.backend_focus: 无。与工程无关，属渠道合作公告，API 集成方式、model id、限流策略均无变化，无需任何代码改动。

items.title: DXC will integrate Claude into the systems banks, airlines, and other regulated industries rely on
items.chinese_summary: Anthropic 与 DXC 达成合作，将 Claude 集成进银行、航空等受监管行业的核心系统。这是企业合作公告，不是面向开发者的产品发布。无 API、SDK、模型或定价变更。
items.backend_focus: 无。与工程无关，属渠道合作公告，开发者侧 API 行为无变化，无需任何代码或配置调整。
